channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization
item.description: President Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization and bomb its power plants by Tuesday night. Online, he said he agreed to suspend the bombing of Iran for two weeks.
item.content:encoded: President Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization and bomb its power plants by Tuesday night. Online, he said he agreed to suspend the bombing of Iran for two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: A Moscow poet highlights the challenges of speaking out against the war in Ukraine
item.description: In Russia, protesting against the war in Ukraine can be dangerous. But one Russian poet living in Moscow, Vadim Dzyuba, is speaking out.
item.content:encoded: In Russia, protesting against the war in Ukraine can be dangerous. But one Russian poet living in Moscow, Vadim Dzyuba, is speaking out.
item.dc:creator: Charles Maynes

item.title: Congressional Democrats raise alarm over Trump's comments on Iran
item.description: Dozens of congressional Democrats raised alarm Tuesday over President Trump's rhetoric about Iran. Most Republican lawmakers have been silent.
item.content:encoded:
Dozens of congressional Democrats raised alarm Tuesday over President Trump's rhetoric about Iran. Most Republican lawmakers have been silent.

(Image credit: Zayrha Rodriguez)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: Australia charges ex‑soldier with 5 war‑crime murders in Afghanistan
item.description: Roberts-Smith is only the second Australian veteran of the Afghanistan campaign to be charged with a war crime.
item.content:encoded:
Roberts-Smith is only the second Australian veteran of the Afghanistan campaign to be charged with a war crime.

(Image credit: Anthony Devlin/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump's deadline for an Iran deal looms. And, Artemis II crew begins the journey home
item.description: In a press conference last night, Trump reiterated threats against Iran if the country doesn't accept a deal by 8:00 p.m. ET tonight. And, the Artemis II crew are on their way back to Earth.
item.content:encoded:
In a press conference last night, Trump reiterated threats against Iran if the country doesn't accept a deal by 8:00 p.m. ET tonight. And, the Artemis II crew are on their way back to Earth.

(Image credit: Alex Wong)
item.dc:creator: Suzanne Nuyen

item.title: U.S. and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire, suspending Trump's threat to annihilate Iran
item.description: After Iran ceded to President Trump's demand to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, Trump backed down from his threat of wide-scale destruction of Iran's civilian and military infrastructure.
item.content:encoded:
After Iran ceded to President Trump's demand to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, Trump backed down from his threat of wide-scale destruction of Iran's civilian and military infrastructure.

(Image credit: Majid Saeedi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Beer cans, helium balloons and mortgages: An unexpected mix of things affected by war
item.description: It's not just oil and gas that are affected by the Iran war. All sorts of shortages and price spikes are starting to pop up that stand to affect people's daily lives.
item.content:encoded:
It's not just oil and gas that are affected by the Iran war. All sorts of shortages and price spikes are starting to pop up that stand to affect people's daily lives.

(Image credit: Brent Jones)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Taiwan's opposition leader arrives in China for a 'Journey of Peace'
item.description: The visit takes place ahead of President Trump's own summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping next month, where Taiwan is expected to be a top agenda item.
item.content:encoded:
The visit takes place ahead of President Trump's own summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping next month, where Taiwan is expected to be a top agenda item.

(Image credit: I-Hwa Cheng)
item.dc:creator: Ashish Valentine

item.title: Vance visits Hungary to bolster support for prime minister ahead of election
item.description: Vice President JD Vance is in Budapest to join an election rally for incumbent Prime Minister Viktor Orbán ahead of Hungary's election.
item.content:encoded: Vice President JD Vance is in Budapest to join an election rally for incumbent Prime Minister Viktor Orbán ahead of Hungary's election.
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz

item.title: Trump provides details behind the dramatic rescue of an American airman trapped in Iran
item.description: President Trump revealed many of the dramatic details on how the U.S. military scrambled to rescue two members of fighter jet that was shot down deep inside Iran.
item.content:encoded: President Trump revealed many of the dramatic details on how the U.S. military scrambled to rescue two members of fighter jet that was shot down deep inside Iran.
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre
